title: physalis stapelioides
intro: Physalis stapelioides, also known as the prickly pear or rat's tail cactus, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the nightshade family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Physalis stapelioides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. Physalis stapelioides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
